provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Marriage (Forms) Regulations.

provisions.title: Form of publication of banns
provisions.content:
2. Form of publication of banns
The publication of banns under section 4 of the Marriage Act (Cap. 29:01) (hereinafter referred to as "the Act") shall be in Form 1 as set out in the First Schedule.

provisions.title: Form of special marriage licence
provisions.content:
3. Form of special marriage licence
The special marriage licence to be issued under section 5 of the Act shall be in Form 2 as set out in the First Schedule.

provisions.title: Certificate of protection of minors
provisions.content:
4. Certificate of protection of minors
The certificates to be issued under section 6(1)( a ) and ( b ) of the Act shall be in Forms 3 and 4 respectively as set out in the First Schedule.

provisions.title: Form of application to be marriage officer
provisions.content:
5. Form of application to be marriage officer
The application to be marriage officer required under section 7(3) of the Act shall be in Form 5 as set out in the First Schedule.

provisions.title: Form of register of marriages
provisions.content:
6. Form of register of marriages
The marriage register required to be kept under section 11(1) of the Act shall be in Form 6 as set out in the First Schedule.

provisions.title: Form of declaration of marriage status
provisions.content:
7. Form of declaration of marriage status
The declaration of marriage status required under section 13(4) of the Act shall be in Form 7 as set out in the First Schedule.

provisions.title: Fees payable under the Act
provisions.content:
8. Fees payable under the Act
The fees payable under the Act shall be as set out in the Second Schedule.

provisions.title: Revocation of Cap. 29:01 (Sub. Leg.)
provisions.content:
9. Revocation of Cap. 29:01 (Sub. Leg.)
The Marriage (Forms) Regulations are hereby revoked.
